title: Fermented Asparagus Wrap
description: A healthy and tasty wrap filled with fermented asparagus, perfect for a quick snack or light meal.
instructions: Preheat a pan to medium heat.
Add a handful of fermented asparagus to the pan and sauté until tender.
Warm the tortilla wrap in the pan for a few seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the sautéed asparagus, lettuce, tomato, and sliced avocado inside.
Add a pinch of chili flakes to taste.
Fold the wrap and serve immediately.
